text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Is that you, ya li'l runts? Ya watched the
race, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I did my best, but the lady racing against me was
real good too, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: She's the same as me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several nights after the spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Comin' in, Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Tamtam! I'm so sorry for the other day. My
emotions got the better of me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
S'okay. What happens in a race stays in the race.
Besides, I was the one who provoked ya.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I totally screwed up by sayin' what I did. I fired ya
up so much, you became the star.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Remember what I said in the waitin' room before
the race?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I'll whomp that trainer lurkin' behind ya so
bad they'll never be the same.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't've said that. I was tryin' to sabotage
your future.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I lit a fire under ya, and the kind Creek was
gone.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
choice_data_list: What's she talking about, Super Creek?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't have cared if you were just trying to
provoke me, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I couldn't let you hurt Trainer's future.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Because I will do everything in my power to make
sure my trainer becomes the best in the world.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That's a dream that I won't budge on.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It hit me when I saw your angry face after the
race...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It was like my mom's face when she gets angry.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The face of somebody tryin' to protect their kid
from some schmuck tryin' to crush their dreams.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I thought the two of you were a ditzy duo, but I
was wrong.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're family. I never realized it, but you're racin'
for somethin' just as precious as I am.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for pickin' a fight. You two are the real
deal.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tamtam... I should be the one apologizing, but
thank you for saying that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Let's have dinner together! You
haven't eaten yet, have you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to call your mommy to let her know,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, my mom?! Ya don't gotta call her when
she's all the way over in Osaka!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What am I s'posed to do with ya?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I'll definitely join you for dinner! Can't miss
out on your tasty cookin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fun dinner together, Super Creek and
Tamamo Cross are back to being best friends.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Phew, thanks for the chow. Anyway, I'm sure your
race against Oguri won't be as scrappy as ours.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
She might be a li'l spacey, but you two have fun
out there, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, okay! I'll do just that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fierce look definitely doesn't suit Super
Creek. I hope she has an amicable race this time
around.
